components.text:
Using the /sect map command allows you to see chunks in chat that are claimed by you, enemy, ally, noone or just another sect

It's what is needed in order to actually see claims unless you go around trying to break blocks!

Using the /sect claim or /sect claim 1(for example) it will claim either the chunk you are in or if you add the number 1 after claim its a 3x3 chunk claim

It will also allow higher radius numbers to be used.
